subcodes.first_line: O ye two faithful servants who have sacrificed your lives for the Abhá Beauty! Your letter was received, and from its perusal a fresh joy was obtained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده باوفای جانفشان جمال ابهی نامه رسید و از قرائتش سروری جدید حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @relationship between government and people
